debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
σ₂ t₀ T x : ℝ
K : ℕ
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioc (5 / 8) 1
ht₀ : t₀ = max (FKS.Hσ (FKS.Inputs.H₀ I) (FKS.Inputs.R I) σ₂) (exp (√(log x) / FKS.Inputs.R I))
hT : T > t₀
ZDB : zero_density_bound
⊢ FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ FKS.ε₄ I t₀ x σ₂ K T

failed_attempts:

    simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv, ← pow_add, ← pow_mul]
    exact pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) (by linarith) (by simpa using hij))
  simp_all [ε₄, Hσ, ZDB.N]

    exact mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left (rpow_lt_rpow_of_exponent_lt (by simp_all) (by simp_all)) (by positivity)

    have hTt₀ : T / t₀ > 1 := by

  have h2 : (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) 0 = t₀ := by simp
  have h3 : (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) (Fin.last (K + 1)) = T := by

  have h₄ : ∀ k, (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) k > 0 := by

have h₁ := proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ (fun k => t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) ht₀ (by simp [hT]) (by
    intro i j hij
    simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv, ← pow_add]
    exact pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) (by linarith) (by simpa using hij))
  cases' h₁ with h₁_left h₁_right
  have h₂ : ∀ k, riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) ≤ ZDB.N σ₂ (t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) := by
    intro k
    exact ZDB.bound σ₂ (by linarith [hσ₂.1, hσ₂.2]) (t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) (by
      have : t₀ ≥ Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂ := by
        rw [ht₀]; exact le_max_left _ _
      have : t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K) ≥ Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂ := by
        calc
          t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K) ≥ t₀ * 1 := by
            apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
            · exact one_le_pow_of_one_le (by
                apply one_le_div
                · linarith
                · linarith)
            · linarith
          _ ≥ Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂ := by linarith
      exact this)
  simp_all [ε₄, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero, Nat.cast_zero, Nat.cast_succ,
    Fin.last, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_last, Fin.succ_castSucc, Fin.castSucc_zero]

have h₁ : StrictMono (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) := by
    intro i j hij
    have h_pow : (T / t₀) ^ (i / K) < (T / t₀) ^ (j / K) := by
      apply Real.rpow_lt_rpow_of_exponent_lt
      · exact div_pos (sub_pos.mpr hT) (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.zero_lt_succ K))
      · exact Nat.cast_lt.mpr (Fin.val_lt_val.mpr hij)
    exact mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h_pow (by linarith)
  have h₂ : (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) 0 = t₀ := by simp
  have h₃ : (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) (Fin.last (K + 1)) = T := by
    simp [Fin.last_eq_castSucc, Fin.castSucc_eq_last]
  rw [ε₄]
  apply proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ _ h₂ h₃ h₁

have h₁ := proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ (fun k => t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) ht₀ (by simp [hT]) (by
    intro i j hij
    simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
    exact pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) (by linarith) (by simpa using hij))
  cases' h₁ with h₁_left h₁_right
  have h₂ : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K + 1)), riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) ≤ ZDB.N σ₂ (t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) := by
    intro k hk
    exact ZDB.bound σ₂ (by linarith [Fin.mem_Ioo.mp hk]) (t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) (by
      have : t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K) ≥ ZDB.T₀ := by
        have : t₀ ≥ Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂ := by simp [ht₀]; apply le_max_left
        have : Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂ ≥ I.H₀ := by apply le_max_left
        have : I.H₀ = 3e12 := rfl
        have : ZDB.T₀ = 3e12 := rfl
        linarith
      linarith)
  calc
    riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ _ := h₁_right
    _ ≤ ε₄ I t₀ x σ₂ K T := by
      simp_all [ε₄, Finset.sum_congr rfl]
      <;> aesop

have h1 := proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ (fun k => t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) ht₀ (by simp [hT]) (by
    intro i j hij
    simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv, ← pow_add]
    exact pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) (by linarith) (by simpa using hij))
  simp_all [ε₄, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero, Nat.cast_zero, Nat.cast_succ,
    Fin.last, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Fin.castSucc_zero, Fin.castSucc_succ]

apply proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ (fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) ht₀ (by simp [hT]) (by
    intro i j hij
    simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
    exact pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) (by linarith) (by simpa using hij))

have h1 : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T) * x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t₀))) / t₀ := by
    apply proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ (fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K)) ht₀ (by simp [hT]) (by
      intro i j hij
      simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
      exact pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) (by linarith) (by simpa using hij))
  have h2 : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K+1)), riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K)) * (x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t₀ * (T / t₀)^((k - 1) / K)))) / (t₀ * (T / t₀)^((k - 1) / K)) - x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K)))) / (t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K)))) + x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t₀ * (T / t₀)^((Fin.last K).castSucc / K)))) / (t₀ * (T / t₀)^((Fin.last K).castSucc / K)) * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T := by
    apply proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ (fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K)) ht₀ (by simp [hT]) (by
      intro i j hij
      simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]
      exact pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) (by linarith) (by simpa using hij))
  sorry

have h1 : StrictMono (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) := by
    intro i j hij
    simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv, ← rpow_add]
    exact rpow_lt_rpow_of_base_gt_one (by linarith) (by simpa using Fin.isStrictMono_castSucc i j hij)
  have h2 : (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) 0 = t₀ := by simp
  have h3 : (fun k : Fin (K + 2) ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) (Fin.last (K + 1)) = T := by
    simp [Fin.last_eq, Nat.cast_succ, div_eq_mul_inv, ← rpow_natCast, rpow_mul]
  rw [ε₄]
  apply proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ _ h2 h3 h1

have h₁ := proposition_3_11 I K hσ₂ (fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) (by simp [ht₀]) (by simp [hT]) (by
    intro i j hij
    simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv, ← pow_add, ← pow_mul]
    exact pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) (by linarith) (by simpa using hij))
  cases' h₁ with h₁_left h₁_right
  have h₂ : ∀ k, k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K + 1)) → riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) ≤ ZDB.N σ₂ (t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K)) := by
    intro k hk
    exact ZDB.bound σ₂ (by linarith [Finset.mem_Ioo.mp hk])
  calc
    riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ _ := h₁_right
    _ ≤ ε₄ I t₀ x σ₂ K T := by
      simp_all [ε₄, Finset.sum_congr rfl]
      <;> apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      <;> intro k hk
      <;> simp_all [Finset.mem_Ioo]
